core_principles: Information Clarity above all: Dashboard must be scanable and intuitive.
Color is Function: 95% of the UI is monochrome. Use color exclusively to guide actions and highlight statuses.
Alignment Precision: Text aligns left, numeric data and currency (₹) strictly align right.
Density Adaptation: 'Control Room' tight grid logic for data-heavy sections.

rules: Mobile-First: Start with grid-cols-1, scale up to md:grid-cols-3 or lg:grid-cols-4 for dashboards.
Gaps: Tight gaps (gap-4 to gap-6) for data correlation.
Surfaces: Flat solid backgrounds. NO glassmorphism. Subtle 1px borders (border-border/40) to expose the grid skeleton.
Radii: Max 4px border-radius (rounded-sm) for a sharp, technical look.

navigation.style: Solid background sidebar or fixed top-nav with hard bottom/right border.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-sm hover:bg-[#002277] hover:text-white transition-colors font-medium px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#E5E5EA] text-[#0A0A0A] rounded-sm hover:bg-[#F3F4F6] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] transition-colors px-4 py-2
buttons.destructive: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white rounded-sm hover:bg-[#D63028] hover:text-white px-4 py-2

cards_and_widgets.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-[#E5E5EA]), no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.

data_tables.density: Compact to Comfortable (py-2 or py-3 for rows).
data_tables.headers: Uppercase, text-xs tracking-wider text-secondary border-b border-[#E5E5EA]

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn components heavily customized. Flat white background, 1px solid border. Focus rings MUST be visible (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/50).

login_hero.description: Modern school building for login page split layout.

receipt_texture.description: Clean white texture, useful for print receipt background or watermarking subtly.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Background darkens slightly for buttons.
interactions_and_motion.accessibility: Must respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus indicators.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements, buttons, links, and form inputs MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install @phosphor-icons/react using yarn for dense dashboard icons.
Use standard .js files for React components.
Ensure 'INR' currency symbol (₹) is used and correctly aligned in right-columns of tables.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Rely solely on the media urls provided.
Use 'lucide-react' if phosphor-icons is unavailable, but prefer phosphor.
Build the dashboard using pure Shadcn form components with tight grids.
